text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First place in the Satsuki Sho slips through Narita
Brian's fingers. Realizing her shortcomings, she
resolves not to lose next time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she doesn't take first, her performance
still impacts the other racers. The press dubs her
"the Beast" in the ensuing articles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian, however, is completely focused on
her next goal—the Japanese Derby.
